title: Sous-vide Garlicky French Stir-fry
description: A velvety and garlicky French dish infused with lemon zest, ready in a single pot using sous-vide technology for maximum flavor and tenderness.
instructions: Season pork tenderloin and chicken breast with salt and pepper.
Cook the pork tenderloin for 1 hour at 57°C (134°F) and the chicken breast for 20 minutes at 60°C (140°F).
Sauté diced garlic in olive oil until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add lemon zest and chopped parsley to the pan. Stir gently to combine with the garlic mixture.
Remove meat from the sous-vide pouches and let them come to room temperature.
Place the cooked meat on a plate and pour the sauce over it.
Drizzle soy sauce evenly over both meats, serve hot.
